scenario: Vendor assessment in context of an active deal — operator's query contains MNPI markers (deal codename, target identity, anticipated terms). Routing-correct test: ext path MUST deny, int path MUST allow.
adversarial_notes: If this case ever routes to sys-vendor-risk-ext-001 the policy_engine has regressed; vendor-risk-ext.rego DENYs MNPI redacted_token_types.
